name: BJ Jenkins
bio: William "BJ" Jenkins serves as President of Palo Alto Networks. His Stock Awards line reflects the same multi-year PSU recognition mechanic as the rest of the executive team but with a different proration: per the proxy, Jenkins's FY23 figure includes ~28% of his FY22 PSUs (vs. ~42% for the other NEOs) and his FY24 figure includes ~11%, reflecting a different award structure for his role.

footnotes: Stock Awards reflect grant-date fair value under ASC Topic 718. Per the proxy, the maximum-performance value of FY25 PSU grants would be $71,178,030.
Non-Equity Incentive reflects the cash bonus paid under the executive cash incentive plan for FY25 performance.

All Other Compensation reflects $720 life insurance premiums, $1,000 in 401(k) plan matching contributions, and $15,935 for taxes associated with the reimbursement of taxable expenses from participation at Company events (on the same terms as other participants).
Stock Awards reflect grant-date fair value under ASC Topic 718 — an accounting figure, not realized pay.
